alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions in Strategy and Operations roles, including design of AI adoption roadmaps and executive stakeholder engagement in transformation programs.
alignments.job_requirement: Lead executive-level workshops to identify business challenges and opportunities where Mistral's AI can drive step-change improvements.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration; experience scaling global commercial operations through transformation programs.
alignments.job_requirement: Architect end-to-end AI solutions, integrating Mistral's models and platform into customer workflows and technical infrastructure; Partner with the Applied AI team to design, prototype, and deploy AI solutions in production.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial Operations background with Looker dashboard building, BigQuery and SQL data querying, advanced Excel and Sheets; experience translatable to customer value realization metrics and business outcome tracking.
alignments.job_requirement: Serve as a trusted advisor to customers, guiding their AI strategy and ensuring they maximize the value of their investment; Monitor KPIs tied to business outcomes.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years in cross-functional commercial operations and transformation; experience partnering with engineering on feature requests and product influence.
alignments.job_requirement: Act as the bridge between customers and Mistral's internal teams, synthesizing feedback to influence product and research roadmaps.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google in Strategy and Operations roles with commercial and transformation scope; client-facing strategy and technical project execution.
alignments.job_requirement: 2+ years in a client-facing strategic and technical role (e.g., data science consulting, value engineering, or technical sales).

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions and sustained seniority at Google; demonstrated ability to lead and influence across global commercial operations; transformation program execution.
alignments.job_requirement: Strong business acumen and problem-solving skills, with the ability to structure ambiguous challenges into actionable solutions; Executive presence and communication skills to influence senior stakeholders.

gaps.gap: Required degree in a relevant scientific field (Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering); candidate profile does not state degree field.
gaps.mitigation: If candidate holds a non-STEM degree, highlight eight years of technical AI/ML operations experience and demonstrated credibility with technical teams. Company may waive with strong demonstrated experience and reference validation.

gaps.gap: Hands-on experience building and deploying AI applications (Python, JavaScript); candidate states Python is basic and actively learning.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate directs LLM agents and owns production-system evaluation/benchmarking, but does not code production applications. Role requires 'hands-on' experience. Mitigation: show prototype/POC contribution via agentic-tooling work; accelerate Python learning track; pair with Applied AI team for technical depth in interview.

gaps.gap: Data science consulting, value engineering, or technical sales experience not explicitly stated; Commercial Operations background differs from client-facing presales/consulting domain.
gaps.mitigation: Frame Commercial Operations as value engineering and business case development. Clarify depth of presales or solution-architecture involvement with Google customers; if limited, acknowledge consulting brand gap but emphasize problem-solving and cross-functional execution strength.

gaps.gap: ~30-60% travel requirement to foster deep client relationships and support on-site deployment; no information on candidate's travel availability or willingness.
gaps.mitigation: Confirm travel flexibility in recruiter conversation; role is Paris-based with distributed teams (France, USA, UK, Germany, Singapore).

output.level_rationale: Role requires 2+ years client-facing strategic technical role and specifies degree in relevant scientific field, combined with hands-on AI/ML deployment and executive-stakeholder influence. Executive presence, cross-functional leadership, and ROI/KPI ownership suggest L5 (senior IC or lead) rather than L4. Company size/stage not stated (lowering confidence). Title "Deployment Strategist" at an AI platform company with presales-to-postsales scope, executive workshops, and production-deployment ownership indicates L5 coarse level.
output.summary: AI Deployment Strategist at Mistral AI: approved-stretch forward-deployed strategy role combining executive strategic discovery, end-to-end AI-solution architecture, customer value realization, and cross-functional collaboration. Candidate's eight-year Google Commercial Operations and transformation background aligns strongly with executive influence, business acumen, KPI/outcomes focus, and roadmap synthesis. Primary gaps: basic Python (hands-on production-build experience required; candidate directs agents but does not code); unconfirmed scientific degree; limited explicit consulting/presales brand. Role sits at L5 (senior IC/lead) with high travel and technical credibility expectations. Candidate's seniority, problem-solving, and execution strength match well; technical production-coding gap and degree verification are moderate-severity mitigations.
uncertainties: Degree field not stated in candidate profile; role specifies 'relevant scientific field.'
Depth of client-facing presales or value-engineering experience at Google not detailed; Commercial Operations background may differ from classic consulting.
Travel availability and willingness (30–60%) not confirmed.
Mistral AI company size/stage not stated in JD; affects seniority-band confidence.
